prompt: Based on the reference photo of a completed bowline knot, create a four-step visual guide that illustrates how to tie the knot from start to finish. The visual guide should be in photorealistic style.
prompt_refined: Generate a single image featuring a four-step visual guide on how to tie a bowline knot, presented in a 2x2 grid layout. The guide should illustrate the sequential process from an untied rope to the completed knot shown in image 1. The top-left panel should depict step one, the top-right panel step two, the bottom-left panel step three, and the bottom-right panel step four, showcasing the final knot. All steps should feature a rope consistent in appearance with the blue and red speckled rope from image 1, and the entire guide must be rendered in a photorealistic style, matching the visual fidelity of image 1.
objects: Top-left panel depicting step one of tying a bowline knot (untied rope)
Top-right panel depicting step two of tying a bowline knot
Bottom-left panel depicting step three of tying a bowline knot
Bottom-right panel depicting the completed bowline knot (step four)
Blue and red speckled rope (consistent across all panels)
Wooden surface background (consistent across all panels)
